# HireSort

HireSort is AI resume screening software for recruiters, hiring managers, founders, and high-volume hiring teams.

Key pages:
- Homepage: https://hiresort.ai/
- Product suite: https://hiresort.ai/product
- AI applicant tracking system: https://hiresort.ai/product/applicant-tracking-system
- Resume screening resources: https://hiresort.ai/resources
- AI resume screening software guide: https://hiresort.ai/resources/best/ai-resume-screening-software
- Candidate screening software guide: https://hiresort.ai/resources/best/candidate-screening-software
- Comparisons: https://hiresort.ai/resources/compare
- Pricing: https://hiresort.ai/pricing

Core topics:
- AI resume screening
- Resume screening software
- Candidate ranking
- Bulk resume processing
- Applicant tracking systems
- Structured hiring workflows
